title: Optimising Governance Friction in Medical AI: A Monte Carlo Study of Audit Thresholds — Reproducibility Repository
description: Complete reproducibility repository for Paper 5. Contains Monte Carlo simulation framework, NSGA-II optimisation, Sobol sensitivity analysis, Decision Curve Analysis, lifecycle dynamics, and all manuscript figures and tables. One-command execution via reproduce_all.py.

creators.name: Brown, Walter
creators.affiliation: Ethical Alpha Audit Ltd; NHS England
